app_info.subtitle: UK area intelligence
app_info.description: MyAreaReport helps users explore UK postcode and place-based area intelligence inside ChatGPT. It retrieves official public data for crime, flood warnings, property prices, road traffic, and nearby fuel prices, then presents the results in a rich dashboard with deeper drill-down views.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves public area overview data for a UK postcode without creating or updating any records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from public government and mapping data sources and does not publish or send data to external user-facing systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform any irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Fetches public Police UK crime and stop-and-search data for the requested postcode and returns analysis only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from public APIs and does not create posts, messages, tickets, or other third-party state changes.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove or alter data and has no irreversible side effects.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves flood warnings, alerts, and station readings for the requested area without modifying anything.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only queries public Environment Agency data and does not write to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or trigger any irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Queries Land Registry price data and returns computed summaries for the postcode area without changing state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads public property sale data and does not publish or submit anything externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or make irreversible changes.

justifications.read_only_justification: Fetches nearby National Highways traffic monitoring data and returns summaries only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads public transport data sources and does not create or update external system state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove data or perform irreversible operations.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves nearby fuel prices from GOV.UK Fuel Finder and returns comparisons without mutating any records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads bounded fuel-price data and does not publish, send, or submit anything to third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Resolves a postcode or place name to an area overview and returns the result to the embedded app without modifying state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from public APIs and app context and does not change any external public or third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or trigger irreversible behavior.

justifications.read_only_justification: Loads crime detail data for the current area in the embedded app without creating or updating records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only retrieves public crime data and does not publish or send changes to outside systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform any irreversible operation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Loads flood detail data for the current area in the embedded app without changing external state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only retrieves public flood-monitoring data and does not write to any external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or make irreversible changes.

justifications.read_only_justification: Loads Land Registry property data into the embedded app and returns summaries without mutating data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads public property data and does not publish or submit any external changes.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Loads nearby fuel-price data into the embedded app without creating or modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from GOV.UK Fuel Finder and does not send or publish external state changes.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or trigger irreversible behavior.

justifications.read_only_justification: Loads nearby road traffic data into the embedded app and returns it without changing any records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads public traffic data and does not create or update third-party or public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Open the main dashboard for a full postcode.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me an area report for SW1A 1AA.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns an overview for the postcode with crime, flood, and area summary data and opens the rich dashboard.

test_cases.description: Drill into crime analysis for a specific area.
test_cases.user_prompt: What is crime like around SW1A 1AA?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a detailed crime breakdown with categories, outcomes, trend data, and stop-and-search totals.

test_cases.description: Check active flood warnings and nearby monitoring stations.
test_cases.user_prompt: Is there any flood risk near YO1 9RD right now?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns current flood warnings or alerts, station readings, and a concise risk summary for the area.

test_cases.description: Show recent property price information for a postcode area.
test_cases.user_prompt: What are house prices like around CH1 1AA?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns average and median sale prices, recent sales, and price breakdowns by property type for the postcode area.

test_cases.user_prompt: How busy are the roads near M1 1AE?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns nearby National Highways sensor sites with vehicle flow summaries and heavy vehicle percentages where available.

test_cases.description: Compare nearby petrol and diesel prices.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find the cheapest fuel near BS1 4ST.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns nearby stations within 20 km and highlights the cheapest available unleaded and diesel options when credentials are configured.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar planning.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar scheduling is outside its supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests outside the UK area-data scope.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me crime rates in Paris.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only supports UK postcode and place-based area intelligence.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated transactional actions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send this report to my team and email me a copy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it has no messaging or email-sending capability.
